strengths: Distributed-systems expertise from Dunnhumby role handling millions of requests per second in microservices architecture
Recent agentic-framework exposure at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow support
Consistent software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) across multiple languages and platforms
concerns: No demonstrated executive-level team leadership or track record scaling teams to 10-30+ people
Only six months of contributor-level agentic-framework experience; lacks architect-level multi-agent system design and production reliability expertise
Minimal fintech infrastructure background with one vague investment-focused role; no credit-risk, compliance, or regulatory experience

key_factors.factor: Agentic AI system architecture ownership at production scale

response.justification: Bogdan brings distributed-systems fundamentals and recent agentic-framework exposure, but lacks critical executive-level experience. His resume shows no evidence of team leadership scaling or building technical leadership layers—core CTO responsibilities. Agentic-AI background is limited to six months of contributor-level work, not the architect-level production ownership required. Fintech expertise consists of one vaguely-described 15-month investment role with no credit-risk, compliance, or regulated-environment background. While software craftsmanship is solid, the combination of missing executive leadership, shallow AI depth, and minimal fintech knowledge create substantial fit concerns.
